title: QSG - X button
scenario: X button on Quick Start Guide does not close QSG and return to Device Settings screen when swiping through multiple QSG pages
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device to enter Device Settings.
3. On the Device Settings screen, locate and tap the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
4. Once the QSG page opens, swipe through multiple QSG screens/pages.
5. On any QSG screen (e.g., the first, middle, or last page), tap the X button located in the upper right corner.
expected: The QSG page closes and the user is returned to the Device Settings screen. This behavior works consistently regardless of which QSG screen the user is currently viewing.
